justification: The pre-registered minimum annualized Sharpe of 1.0 failed with an observed value of -1.397395024149964; the pre-registered maximum drawdown of 0.30 failed with an observed value of 0.6032419110208322; the pre-registered minimum hit rate of 0.50 failed with an observed value of 0.4830421377183967; and the pre-registered stability requirement of at least 3 sign-consistent folds passed with 3/4. The required deflated Sharpe ratio of 0.95 failed with an observed value of 0.01073639878348931. Because this is iteration 0 and the ordered pre-registered grid has untried entries, the decision is ITERATE using its first untried entry, {"lookback_days":60,"skip_days":7}.
